title: Ctrl
notes:
Gatefold sleeve. Includes an 8-page booklet. Download code printed on the booklet.

Supermodel:
Recorded at No Excuses

Love Galore:
Travis Scott / Recorded by Blake Harden at home studio & Windmark Recording, Santa Monica, CA
Recorded at The Lake House in Michigan

Doves In The Wind:
Kendrick Lemar / Recorded [...] at No Excuses
Recorded at No Excuses
Contains a sample of the recording "Let's Get Dirty (I Can't Get In Da Club)" written by Reggie Noble, John Bowman and Dana Stinson as performed by Redman, published by Warner-Tamerlane Publishing Corp. (BMI), Dayna's Day Publishing (BMI), WB Music Corp. (ASCAP), Funky Noble Productions, Inc. (ASCAP) & CLR, Inc. (ASCAP). All rights administered by Warner-Tamerlane Publishing Corp. (BMI) and WB Music Corp. (ASCAP) courtesy of Def Jam Recordings, a division of UMG Recordings, Inc. Under license from Universal Music Enterprises.
Contains an interpolation from "Turn Me Up Some" written by Trevor Smith and James Yancey, published by Universal Polygram International Publishing, Inc. O/B/O itself and E.P.H.C.Y. Publishing (ASCAP)/Kobalt Music Publishing/T'Ziah Music (BMI).

Drew Barrymore:
Recorded at Engineears Studios

Prom:
Recorded at Engineears Studios

The Weekend:
Recorded at Platinum Sounds Studios
Contains elements of "Set The Mood (Prelude)" written by Justin Timberlake, Timothy Mosely and Floyd Hills as performed by Justin Timberlake, published by W.B.M. Music Corp. (SESAC) and Danjahandz Muzik (SESAC). All rights administered by W.B.M. Music Corp. (SESAC)/Universal Music - Z Tunes LLC O/B/O Tennman Tunes (ASCAP)/Ole Virginia Beach Music (ASCAP).

Go Gina:
Recorded at No Excuses

Garden (Say It Like Dat):
Recorded at No Excuses

Broken Clocks:
Recorded at The Lake House in Michigan
This composition embodies portions of "West" written by Thomas Paxton-Beesley, Adam Feeney and Ashton Simmons as performed by River Tiber, published by EMI April Music, Inc. (ASCAP)/EMI Music Publishing Ltd., Nyankingmusic/Arts & Crafts Music, Inc. D/B/A Galleryac Music

Anything:
Recorded at Top Dawg House Of Pain
Contains a sample of the recording "Spring Affair" written by Georgio Moroder, Peter Bellotte and Donna Summer as performed by Donna Summer, published by WB Music Corp./Sweet Summer Nights Music (ASCAP) courtesy of Universal Music Enterprises, a division of UMG Recordings, Inc.

Wavy (Interlude):
James Fauntleroy / Recorded [...] at 1500 Or Nothin' Studios

Normal Girl:
Recorded at No Excuses

Pretty Little Birds:
Isaiah Rashad / Recorded by Josef Leimberg at Josef's studio
Recorded at Josef's studio

20 Something:
Recorded at Windmark Recording, Santa Monica, CA

℗ & © 2017 Top Dawg Entertainment under exlcusive license to RCA Records, a division of Sony Music Entertainment 
Marketed and distributed by Sony Music Entertainment, 25 Madison Avenue, New York, New York 10010-8601.
